ddls:
CREATE TABLE "procurement_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the supplier is a preferred vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the supplier's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was raised */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the purchase order */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who approved the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the purchase order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES procurement_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was received */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "vat_amount" REAL /* VAT amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was paid */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the invoice */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who approved the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the inventory item is stored */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES procurement_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was assigned */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the asset is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the asset is expected to be returned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the department is based */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee is based */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employee is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the employee was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the employee's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role-permission assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role-permission assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
